svg.text: Every check the solver runs, its direction, and whether it auto-remediates
read-only diagnostic — no automated fix path
8 layers · residual auto-remediated each solve cycle
each requirement must have a formal model covering it
each formal invariant must have a backing unit test
formal verification checks must pass against running code
code constants must match formal model constants exactly
all unit and integration tests must pass
each requirement must appear in developer documentation
doc structural claims must be live — no dead paths, missing CLI, absent dependencies
acknowledged debt entries must stay within formal model thresholds
3 layers · never auto-remediated · surfaces candidates for human approval
source modules in bin/ and hooks/ with no requirement tracing annotation
test files with no @req annotation or formal-test-sync mapping
doc capability claims that have no backing requirement
layer manifest wiring must match the collected evidence artifacts
evidence artifacts must map clearly back to formal model intent
purpose-mapped evidence must be fully covered by tests
6 signals · read-only diagnostics · no automated fix path
formal models still at gate maturity 0 — not yet promoted through any Gate A / B / C checkpoint
high-churn code files (git heatmap) with no formal model coverage — hot spots lacking specification
failure scenarios in git history that formal models cannot explain — TLA+ spec has drifted from real incidents
formal model self-consistency check — flags fat, unbounded, or overly complex models
tier-1 model assumptions measured against observed data — violated hypotheses flagged for revision
known bugs and reproduction records with no covering formal model — specification blind spot
Node key — R: Requirements · F: Formal Models · T: Tests · C: Code · D: Docs · P: Production/Debt · B: Bug Records · G: Git History · H: Hypothesis · E: Evidence · M: Measurement
